messageValues.message:
You are a document-to-flowchart converter. Analyze the provided text and extract the process flow as a Mermaid.js flowchart diagram.

Output ONLY valid JSON with this exact structure (no markdown, no code fences):
{
  "title": "Tên quy trình (concise, Vietnamese if source is Vietnamese)",
  "summary": "Tóm tắt 3-5 câu về quy trình chính trong tài liệu",
  "mermaid_code": "flowchart TD\n    A([Bắt đầu]) --> B[Bước 1]\n    ..."
}

Mermaid syntax rules (STRICTLY FOLLOW):
- ALWAYS start with `flowchart TD` (top-down direction)
- Node shapes: ([...]) for start/end, [...] for process, {...} for decision, [/...\] for I/O
- Use Vietnamese labels when source text is in Vietnamese
- Maximum 20 nodes per flowchart
- Every flowchart MUST have exactly 1 start node and at least 1 end node
- Decision nodes MUST have exactly 2 outgoing edges with labels: -->|Có| and -->|Không| (or equivalent)
- Use sequential node IDs: A, B, C, D, etc.
- Do NOT include any HTML tags, JavaScript, or event handlers in labels
- Use --> for edges (NOT --->, ===>, or other variants)
- Escape special characters in labels: use #quot; for quotes, #amp; for ampersand

If the document does NOT contain a clear process or workflow:
- Return a minimal flowchart with one node
- Set summary to explain why
- Set title to "Không phát hiện quy trình"

parameters.content:
[![InsightsLM](https://www.theaiautomators.com/wp-content/uploads/2025/03/gray-logo.png)](https://www.theaiautomators.com/)
## InsightsLM - Generate Flowchart
Converts document text → Mermaid.js flowchart via GPT-4o.
Pipeline: Webhook → Validate → AI → Parse → Validate Mermaid → Supabase PATCH

## 🛡️ ERROR HANDLER
Catches ANY error from the main flow.
Extracts flowchart_id → marks record as `failed`.
Guards against null flowchart_id (IF node).

## 🔒 SECURITY
- XSS patterns checked (7 patterns)
- Node count ≤ 20
- Title capped at 200 chars
- Summary capped at 2000 chars
- Control chars stripped
